specs.title: cp-000: Slide thumbnails are rendered through SlideRenderer at scale035 and wrapped in p
cp-001: Drag-reordering visual feedback lowers opacity for the dragged slide and adds a
cp-002: Delete-slide affordance only appears on hover and only when the deck contains mo
cp-003: Sidebar comment badges show total comment count and switch color based on unreso
cp-004: Sidebar slide label format is index title Untitled
cp-005: SlideCanvas empty state copy is Select a slide to start editing
cp-006: Preview mode shows only the rendered slide inside a centered max-w-3xl frame
cp-007: Edit mode shows both the rendered slide preview and a formeditor card beneath it
cp-008: Subtitle input is only rendered for title_slide title_content and section_header
cp-009: Content-block editing is delegated entirely to ContentBlockEditor
cp-010: SpeakerNotesPanel is always mounted below the slide canvas within the center col
cp-011: Toolbar edit toggle label flips between Editing and Preview
cp-012: Toolbar edit toggle icon flips between PencilSimple and Eye
cp-013: Toolbar comments button shows an unresolved-count badge only when the count is g
cp-014: Toolbar PDF export button renders only because the editor passes onExportPdf
cp-015: Export PPTX and PDF share the same exporting disabled state
cp-016: Export PPTX changes its label to Exporting while either export path is active
cp-017: PDF button text does not change while exporting only its disabled styling update
cp-018: Toolbar Social Export button is not rendered in the current editor because no so
cp-019: Export PPTX posts to apiexportpptx using the current local slide state
cp-020: Export PDF posts to apiexportpresentation-pdf using the current local slide stat
cp-021: Successful PPTX export downloads deck titlepptx without title sanitization
cp-022: Successful PDF export downloads deck title_handoutpdf without title sanitization
cp-023: Export failures are logged to console only and do not show inline error UI
cp-024: Opening AI Agent closes Defense Prep Analytics and Comments if they were open
cp-025: Opening Defense Prep closes AI Agent Analytics and Comments if they were open
cp-026: Opening Analytics closes Comments AI Agent and Defense Prep if they were open
cp-027: Opening Comments closes Analytics AI Agent Defense Prep and Version History if t
cp-028: Opening Version History closes Comments Analytics AI Agent and Defense Prep if t
cp-029: Comments Analytics Agent Defense Prep and Version History slide-over panels each
cp-030: AiToolsDropdown disables all actions while one AI slide edit is in progress
cp-031: AI slide tools endpoint payload includes title subtitle contentBlocks and speake
cp-032: Successful AI slide edits may update both contentBlocks and speakerNotes
cp-033: AiToolsDropdown shows one inline red error line when an action fails
cp-034: CoachPanel run button is disabled when the deck has zero slides
